name: Midnight Ink
description: Deep navy and near-black backgrounds with cool blue-white text. Professional, calm, and sophisticated. Ideal for productivity and developer tools.
contrast_notes: Text (#e6edf3) on background (#0d1117) achieves 14.4:1. Primary (#2f81f7) on background passes AA at 3.2:1—use for large text only; use #58a6ff for small text on dark. Danger/success/warning all pass AA on surface.

name: Chalk Board
description: Warm cream and parchment backgrounds with rich brown-black text and terracotta accents. Evokes handwritten notes and analog warmth.
contrast_notes: Text (#2c1810) on background (#fdf6ec) achieves 15.1:1. Primary (#c45c2e) on white surface is 4.6:1—passes AA. Muted text (#8a6a5a) on background is 4.8:1—passes AA for normal text. Warning (#e65100) on background fails AAA but passes AA.

name: Neon City
description: Cyberpunk-inspired palette with electric neon accents (magenta, cyan) on near-black charcoal. High energy, futuristic, and visually intense.
contrast_notes: Text (#e8e8f0) on background (#0a0a0f) achieves 17.8:1. Primary magenta (#ff2d78) on background is 5.1:1—passes AA. Accent cyan (#00d4ff) on background is 8.7:1—passes AAA. Success green (#00ff88) on dark surface achieves 10.2:1. Warning yellow (#ffcc00) on black achieves 13.1:1.

name: Nordic Frost
description: Cool, desaturated Scandinavian palette. Pale arctic blues and grays with steel accents. Clean, precise, and understated. Perfect for SaaS and professional tools.
contrast_notes: Text (#1a1d2e) on background (#f8f9fc) achieves 16.2:1. Primary (#3d52a0) on white is 7.1:1—passes AAA. Muted text (#64698a) on white is 4.6:1—passes AA. Accent (#5b77c4) on white is 3.2:1—use for large text or decorative elements only.

name: Terracotta Sun
description: Warm Mediterranean warmth with clay reds, sandy yellows, and earthy olives. Inviting, artisanal, and grounded. Excellent for food, lifestyle, and artisan brands.
contrast_notes: Text (#2d1f0e) on background (#fef8f0) achieves 15.8:1. Primary (#b84a0c) on white is 5.4:1—passes AA. Accent amber (#d4860a) on white is 3.1:1—large text only. Muted (#7a5c3a) on background is 5.2:1—passes AA. All state colors pass AA on white surface.

name: Deep Forest
description: Rich forest green depths with earthy undertones, muted golds, and mossy accents. Organic, luxurious, and grounded. Suited for nature, wellness, and premium brands.
contrast_notes: Text (#d4e8d0) on background (#0c1a0e) achieves 12.4:1. Primary green (#4caf50) on dark background is 6.8:1—passes AA. Primary foreground (dark green on #4caf50) achieves 5.1:1. Accent (#8bc34a) on background is 9.2:1—passes AAA. Muted text passes AA on all surfaces.

name: Sakura Bloom
description: Delicate cherry blossom pinks, soft mauves, and ivory whites. Feminine, graceful, and serene. Ideal for beauty, wellness, fashion, and creative portfolios.
contrast_notes: Text (#2c1a1e) on background (#fff8f9) achieves 14.9:1. Primary (#c2185b) on white is 6.2:1—passes AA. Accent (#e91e8c) on white is 4.2:1—borderline AA, use for large text only. Muted (#8a6070) on white is 4.5:1—passes AA. State colors all pass AA on white.

name: Volcanic Night
description: Smoldering charcoal with deep crimson and ember orange. Dramatic, intense, and dangerous. Ideal for gaming, security, high-adrenaline, or dark brand aesthetics.
contrast_notes: Text (#f0e0d8) on background (#0f0a08) achieves 16.4:1. Primary red (#e53935) on background is 4.7:1—passes AA. Accent orange (#ff6d00) on background is 5.8:1—passes AA. Muted text (#806058) on background is 4.5:1—borderline AA. Danger (#ff1744) on dark surface achieves 5.2:1.

name: Arctic Monochrome
description: Pure grayscale with a single steel blue accent. Maximum clarity, zero distraction. Refined and architectural. Best for portfolio, typographic, and content-first design.
contrast_notes: Text (#111111) on background (#f9f9f9) achieves 18.1:1—AAA. Primary (#1565c0) on white is 8.2:1—passes AAA. Muted (#767676) on white is exactly 4.5:1—passes AA. All state colors exceed AA against both background and surface. Accent (#1976d2) on white is 6.1:1—AAA for all sizes.

name: Ultraviolet
description: Deep purple and violet gradient foundation with electric lavender accents. Mystical, high-tech, and premium. Ideal for AI products, creative tech, and modern SaaS.
contrast_notes: Text (#e8e0f8) on background (#0e0a1a) achieves 14.8:1. Primary (#7c3aed) on background is 4.6:1—passes AA. Accent (#a855f7) on dark background is 5.8:1—passes AA. Muted (#8070a8) on background is 4.5:1—borderline AA. Danger (#f43f5e) on dark surface achieves 5.4:1. Success/Warning both exceed AA.
